texto: I will place no value on anything I have or may possess, except in relation to the kingdom of Christ. If anything will advance the interests of that kingdom, it shall be given away or kept, only as by giving or keeping it I shall most promote the glory ofHim to whom I owe all my hopes in time and eternity.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Moffat sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “I will place no value on anything I have or may possess, except in relation to the kingdom of Chr…” articula reflexao, christian-life, kingdom-of-god em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como kingdom-of-god.
